title: Class specialization is ignored for associative array as a class type parameter

features.name: class specialization with associative array type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with an associative array type used as the type parameter in a class specialization

features.name: associative array as class type parameter
features.description: Code should include using an associative array type as a class type parameter via typedef

features.name: static method call on class specialization
features.description: Code should include calling a static method on a class that has been specialized with a complex type
